author: gb9t
content:
**Phase B advance: fs/ tier complete (VFS + 78 filesystems).**

.design/fs/00-overview.md (442 lines, 17 REQ / 15 AC, 4 open).

Coverage: 5/14 in-scope subsystems with Tier-2 drafts (arch + arch/x86, lib, mm, kernel, fs).

Tier-3 layout (40+ docs in nested subtrees):
- vfs/ (core: 00-overview + inode, dcache, super, file-table, mount, path-resolution, fs-context)
- syscalls.md (cross-ref to 140 Tier-5 docs)
- exec-binfmt, iomap, netfs, jbd2, fs-crypto, fs-verity, fsnotify, quota, buffer-cache, direct-io+dax, pipe-splice, event-fds, aio, charset
- pseudo-fs/ (00-overview + proc, sysfs, devpts, ramfs-tmpfs, hugetlbfs, debugfs, configfs, tracefs, efivarfs, pstore, kernfs)
- disk-fs/ (00-overview + per-FS in v0 port set: ext4, btrfs, xfs, fat-vfat, exfat, ntfs3, iso9660, squashfs, erofs, f2fs)
- network-fs/ (00-overview + nfs-client, nfs-server, cifs-smb, ceph, 9p, afs)
- stacked-fs/ (00-overview + overlayfs, fuse, ecryptfs, autofs)

fs/dcache is the FOURTH and FINAL of four MANDATORY Layer-3 subsystems per D4. All four mandatory Layer-3 areas now declared:
1. mm: buddy + slab freelist + VMA tree (mm/00-overview.md)
2. arch/x86: page-table walker + IDT/TSS/per-CPU (arch/x86/00-overview.md)
3. kernel/sched: CFS rbtree + RT priority + DL deadline + PI-graph + cgroup accounting (kernel/00-overview.md)
4. fs/dcache: dcache tree + LRU + inode SB list + fdtable + mount tree + posix locks (fs/00-overview.md)

Compat slice owned by fs/:
- 140+ filesystem syscalls (open/openat2/close_range/read/write/preadv2/pwritev2/lseek/tee/splice/copy_file_range/sendfile/truncate/fallocate/posix_fadvise/dup3/fcntl/flock/mkdir/rmdir/mknod/link/unlink/rename/renameat2/chmod/chown/fchownat/chroot/getcwd/mount/umount2/fsmount/fsopen/move_mount/pivot_root/getdents64/quotactl/name_to_handle_at/setxattr/...)
- mount + namespace propagation rules
- statx (every STATX_* mask) + struct statx layout
- fanotify, inotify, dnotify event wire format
- POSIX/OFD/lease lock semantics
- fs-crypto (fscrypt) policy + ioctl ABI
- fs-verity Merkle format + ioctls
- ELF binfmt + auxv + binfmt_misc registrations
- coredump ELF format
- /proc/<pid>/{fd,fdinfo,mountinfo,mounts}
- mount(8) syntax
- io_uring fs-op semantics

4 open questions:
Q1: Filesystem v0 port set — recommend 3-bucket split: full Rust port for ext4/btrfs/xfs/tmpfs+pseudo-FS-suite/overlayfs/fuse/9p/iso9660/squashfs/vfat; FFI-to-upstream-C for nfs/cifs/f2fs/exfat/ntfs3/ecryptfs/autofs/ceph/jbd2; CONFIG=n for the long tail (~30 filesystems)
Q2: jbd2 — defer Rust port to v1+ (FFI in v0); ext4's Rust impl uses jbd2 via FFI
Q3: NFS server — defer Rust port (FFI in v0)
Q4: tmpfs huge-pages — in v0 (mm/THP integration)

All upstream paths verified.

**Phase B status: 5 of ~14-16 subsystem overviews drafted. Halfway through Phase B.**

Next in dependency order: block/00-overview.md, then net/, ipc/, crypto/, security/, init/, io_uring/, virt/, drivers/, sound/.
